arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer update: Club reportedly in talks with European giant over Marcus Rashford loan deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly in discussions with a European giant about a loan deal for Marcus Rashford, but time is running out for the forward to leave.

arts.ttl: Man Utd close to signing Lecce left-back Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Lecce and Denmark left-back Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: “I have nothing against Marcus Rashford” – Ruben Amorim leaves door open for Man United winger
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has made it clear that if Marcus Rashford wants to play for Manchester United again, he needs to prove he’s hungry for it and raise his standards. The last time Rashford featured for United was in their 2-1 win over Viktoria Plzen early last month. arts.ttl: 'It's not 40, it's 50!' - Amorim on his age after two months at Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is content with his side's win away at Fulham, as he jokes about aging prematurely after after being at the club for two months.

arts.ttl: Analysis: How 'frustrating' Hojlund blunted Man Utd
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger and Shay Given criticise the performance of Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund in his side's 1-0 Premier League win away at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Rashford 'must change' before Man Utd return - Amorim
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford "has to change" before he will be allowed to return to action for Manchester United, says head coach Ruben Amorim.
